/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 CMakeFiles/statistics_test.dir/statistics/test.c.o CMakeFiles/statistics_test.dir/statistics/test_nist.c.o CMakeFiles/statistics_test.dir/statistics/test_robust.c.o -o bin/statistics_test  libgsl.a libgslcblas.a -lm
